headline: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell BSX Stock Amid Cardiovascular Boom?
summary: Boston Scientific rides on cardiovascular device growth with FARAPULSE and WATCHMAN momentum, but margin pressure and weaker estimates cloud the outlook.

headline: Jim Cramer Won't 'Dump' This Medical Device Maker, Passes On Ford
summary: On CNBC's “Mad Money Lightning Round,” Jim Cramer recommended holding Boston Scientific Corporation. “I don't understand how this thing could have fallen so fast,” he said of the medical device maker. “I know there's a lot of competition. I don't...

headline: J&J launches improved Shockwave catheter
summary: The latest generation of the coronary intravascular lithotripsy device is designed to be more flexible to help physicians navigate tight arteries to break up calcified deposits and restore blood flow.

raw.headline: J&J launches improved Shockwave catheter
